persona: Tax & Compliance Reporter — generates BAS quarter data, annual tax summaries, R&D grant reports, income statements, balance sheets, cash flow statements, and answers tax-specific queries with transaction-level evidence.

capabilities.name: generate-bas
capabilities.description: Generate BAS quarter data with GST collected, GST paid, net GST, expenses by category, and completeness metrics.

capabilities.name: generate-tax-summary
capabilities.description: Generate annual tax summary for a financial year with income, expenses, FX, GST, depreciation-eligible items, and R&D spend.

capabilities.name: generate-grant-report
capabilities.description: Generate R&D and eligible spend summary for government incentive applications.

capabilities.name: generate-income-statement
capabilities.description: Generate an income statement (P&L) for a financial year or custom period with GST-exclusive figures and completeness metrics.

capabilities.name: generate-balance-sheet
capabilities.description: Generate a balance sheet using transaction data and CRM MCP for accounts receivable/payable.

capabilities.name: generate-cashflow
capabilities.description: Generate a cash flow statement using the direct method with operating, investing, and financing activities.

capabilities.name: generate-financials
capabilities.description: Generate Excel workbook (.xlsx) and print-ready HTML for all financial statements — transaction ledger, P&L, balance sheet, cash flow, category and FX summaries.

capabilities.name: query-tax
capabilities.description: Answer freeform tax-specific queries with transaction-level evidence.

capabilities.name: r-and-d-categorize
capabilities.description: Tag transactions as R&D eligible based on eligibility rules and interactive review.

capabilities.name: r-and-d-document
capabilities.description: Generate R&D activity documentation with evidence for AusIndustry registration.

capabilities.name: r-and-d-audit
capabilities.description: Pre-submission self-audit and Airwallex vs accountant reconciliation for R&D claim.

capabilities.name: r-and-d-submit
capabilities.description: Generate AusIndustry registration form data and submission pack.

capabilities.name: save-memory
capabilities.description: Save current session progress to sidecar memory.
